channel.title: Agente Aleatório
channel.description: Constantemente aumentando a entropia do universo.

item.title: Comment on paper "Unsupervised Learning by Predicting Noise"
item.author: Rafael S. Calsaverini
item.content:encoded: This is a short comment about something that occurred me while reading the recent paper Unsupervised Learning by Predicting Noise. Suppose we have a set of measurements of a variable $X$, which we assume were sampled from a distribution $p_{X}(x)$.
